name: Virtualization
description: VMware vSphere, Hyper-V, and KVM virtual infrastructure — host contention, VM sprawl, and capacity planning.
quickTip: Install Splunk Add-on for VMware and connect to vCenter to pull ESXi host and VM performance data.

subcategories.name: VMware vSphere
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for VMware (`Splunk_TA_vmware`, Splunkbase 3215) — Free on Splunkbase; Splunk App for VMware (optional, provides dashboards)

subcategories.name: Microsoft Hyper-V
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Hyper-V, `Splunk_TA_windows` — Free on Splunkbase

subcategories.name: KVM / Proxmox / oVirt
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom inputs via libvirt API, syslog

subcategories.name: Cross-Platform Virtualization
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Multiple — combines data from VMware, Hyper-V, KVM sources with CMDB/asset lookups

subcategories.name: End-User Computing / VDI Endpoints
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom scripted inputs polling IGEL UMS REST API (IMI v3), Splunk Universal Forwarder monitoring UMS security log files, IGEL OS rsyslog forwarding via TLS
subcategories.dataSources: IGEL UMS REST API inventory (`/v3/thinclients`, `/v3/firmwares`), UMS check-status endpoint, UMS security audit logs (`ums-server-security.log`), ICG security logs (`icg-security.log`), IGEL OS syslog (rsyslog via TLS)

subcategories.name: Citrix Virtual Apps & Desktops
subcategories.primaryAppTa: uberAgent UXM for Splunk (Splunkbase 1448, searchhead app) + uberAgent indexer app (Splunkbase 2998), Template for Citrix XenDesktop 7 (`TA-XD7-Broker`, `TA-XD7-VDA`), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows, Splunk Add-on for Microsoft IIS (StoreFront), Citrix Monitor Service OData API scripted inputs
subcategories.dataSources: uberAgent endpoint telemetry via HEC (`uberAgent:*` sourcetypes — session, logon, application, machine, browser, Citrix site metrics), Citrix Broker Service event logs (indexes: `xd`, `xd_winevents`, `xd_alerts`), VDA performance counters (`xd_perfmon`), Citrix StoreFront IIS W3C logs, Citrix Monitor Service OData API (session/logon/machine data), Citrix Licensing logs, Citrix PVS streaming logs, Citrix Profile Management logs, Citrix FAS certificate events
